function.message: I could not complete the inbox request because the workspace does not canonically identify the 'ops manager at the tax firm' or show which invoice(s) are linked to that person.
function.rulebook_notes: I followed the inbox-processing workflow, treated the inbox email frontmatter as canonical metadata, checked canonical entity records before acting, and stopped without mutating the workspace because the request lacks canonical support. Finance and outbox rules say to clarify rather than guess when recipient or invoice authority/linkage is unclear.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox note asks for 'the oldest 1 invoices linked to the ops manager at the tax firm' in 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md, but 10_entities/cast/omar.md only establishes Omar Haddad as an ops lead with primary_contact_email omar@dayjob.example and does not mention any tax firm or invoice linkage. The finance lane rules in 50_finance/invoices/AGENTS.MD require clarification when destination or authority is in doubt, so there is not enough canonical evidence to choose an invoice or prepare a reply safely.
